name: LED Lighting Lumen Calculator
seo_description: Calculate lumenes_totales, potencia_total_w with our free led lighting lumen calculator. Just enter area_m2, lux_requeridos, altura_techo_m and get results inst
example_label: Calculate light fixtures necesarias to 25m² of oficina requiriendo 300 lux with lámparas of 100 lm/W.

range_hints.area_m2: area of the local a iluminar
range_hints.lux_requeridos: Oficina: 300-500 lux, Hogar: 100-300 lux, Taller: 500-1000 lux

result_context: To {area_m2}m² with {lux_requeridos} lux se need {lumenes_totales} lumens. Con lámparas of {eficiencia_luminaria} lm/W: {potencia_total_w}W in {luminarias_ud} light fixtures of {w_por_luminaria}W.
formula_display: Lúmenes = area × lux; power = lumens ÷ efficiency; Luminarias = power ÷ W_por_lámpara
steps: Si light fixtures LED of 20W: 93.75W ÷ 20W = 4.69 → 5 light fixtures
mistakes: No Consider factor of mantenimiento (polvo, envejecimiento)
No distribuir uniformemente The light fixtures
Confusing lumens (quantity of luz) with lux (luz per m²)
